Class Obsidium

java.lang.Object
org.obsidium.Obsidium
public class Obsidium extends Object
The central class for creating windows and retrieving properties of the current device.
Since:
1.0
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • Obsidium

      public Obsidium()

  • Method Details

    • createWindow

      public static Window createWindow(int width, int height, String title, int x, int y, boolean stopProgramOnClose)
      Creates a new window with full configuration.

      If this is the last open window, closing it will exit the program, even if stopProgramOnClose is false.

      Parameters:
      width - the width in pixels; if <= 0, defaults to 800
      height - the height in pixels; if <= 0, defaults to 600
      title - the window title
      x - the x-coordinate of the window, relative to the physical display
      y - the y-coordinate of the window, relative to the physical display
      stopProgramOnClose - if true, closing this window exits the program
      Returns:
      the created and registered Window
      Since:
      1.0

    • createWindow

      public static Window createWindow(int width, int height, String title, int x, int y)
      Creates a new window with stopProgramOnClose = false.

      See createWindow(int, int, String, int, int, boolean) for full documentation.

    • createWindow

      public static Window createWindow(int width, int height, String title, boolean stopProgramOnClose)
      Creates a new window at the center of the screen.

      See createWindow(int, int, String, int, int, boolean) for full documentation.

    • createWindow

      public static Window createWindow(int width, int height, String title)
      Creates a new window at the center of the screen with stopProgramOnClose = false.

      See createWindow(int, int, String, int, int, boolean) for full documentation.

    • createWindow

      public static Window createWindow()
      Creates a new window with the propertys:
      • a resolution of 800x600
      • centered on the screen
      • stopProgramOnClose = false

      See createWindow(int, int, String, int, int, boolean) for full documentation.

    • closeWindow

      protected static void closeWindow(Window window)

    • getScreenSize

      public static Vector2 getScreenSize()
      Returns the size of the primary screen.
      Returns:
      a Vector2 representing the screen dimensions

    • getMousePos

      public static Vector2 getMousePos()
      Returns the coordinates of the mouse relative to the primary screen.
      Returns:
      a Vector2 containing the mouse cursor position in pixels

    • getMousePosX

      public static int getMousePosX()
      Returns the x coordinate of the mouse relative to the primary screen.
      Returns:
      the x coordinate of the mouse in pixels

    • getMousePosY

      public static int getMousePosY()
      Returns the y coordinate of the mouse relative to the primary screen.
      Returns:
      the y coordinate of the mouse in pixels
